src: A sleek domestic short-haired ginger cat with tabby stripes, large alert ears, and wide golden eyes. Its fur is smooth and glossy in sunlight, with a lean athletic body.
edit: A knitted cat-shaped creature from ochre and cream yarn, with intricate patterns. The eyes are brighter yarn buttons, small tufts add texture, and neatly stitched ears with alternating yarn colors.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: The object lays on its right side (left side of the frame), covered with dry leaves and sunlight patches amidst dense foliage, surrounded by leafy plants. Lighting creates a dappled effect over the scene.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: the object is sitting upright on an uneven surface of dry leaves and green grass in a woodland setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: the object sits centrally on dry leaves with scattered greenery, enclosed by thick bushes in a forest.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The object sits off-center with an alert posture among brown leaves and tufts of grass, enveloped in shadow, surrounded by interwoven branches and undergrowth.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: the object is a close-up with the face in focus against a blurry backdrop of dark woods and greenery, contrasting the light on the face with the dark environment.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: The object is on the ground, leaning on its right side, illuminated by moonlight through cloud cover. It's surrounded by leafy plant silhouettes, with starlight speckling the area, creating a tranquil night scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The object sits upright on dry leaves and grass, softly illuminated by moonlight. Nearby trees cast long shadows under the night sky with stars twinkling above, creating a tranquil woodland scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: The object is centrally placed on dark leaves under moonlight, surrounded by silver-tinged greenery and thick bushes. The forest is deep in shadows from the night glow.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: An object sits off-center under a night sky, nestled among brown leaves and grass. Surrounded by branches and undergrowth, softly illuminated by moonlight, with stars above.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: The object is shown in a close-up under the night sky, with the face lit by moonlight against shadowy woods and faint starlight, capturing the glow on the face and surrounding darkness.

prompt_shared: an animal knitted from a two-colored yarn
